expectations.evidence: No CDN links, external stylesheets, or external script references found. All CSS is inline in a <style> block and all JavaScript is inline in a <script> block. The only match for 'CDN' is in a failure_conditions text string describing what NOT to do, not an actual external dependency.

Four tab buttons present with data-tab attributes: Strategy (line 648), Timeline (line 649), Feasibility (line 650), Comments (line 651). Each has a corresponding tab-content div: tab-strategy, tab-timeline, tab-feasibility, tab-comments.

Both required tokens are present: --bg-primary: #0D1117 (line 9) and --color-water: #58A6FF (line 15). Note: the file uses a different naming convention for other palette tokens (--color-success, --color-warning, --color-danger instead of --color-air, --color-earth, --color-fire), but the two specifically asserted tokens are correct.

The file has renderComments (line 1288) and saveComments (line 1343, plural — saves to storage, not the same as saveComment which creates a single comment). However, handleTextSelection is NOT present as a named function — text selection is handled by an anonymous mouseup listener. deleteComment is NOT present as a named function — deletion is handled via inline event listeners on buttons. exportFeedback is NOT present as a named function — export is handled via an anonymous click listener on export-comments-btn. Of the 5 required functions (handleTextSelection, saveComment, deleteComment, renderComments, exportFeedback), only renderComments is present by exact name.

localStorage is used (setItem at line 1345, getItem at line 1351), but the storage key is 'meridian-roadmap-brief-comments' (line 1154), not the required 'meridian-comments' key prefix. The assertion requires the 'meridian-comments' key.

Three action buttons present: Tether (btn-tether, line 1130), Vanish (btn-vanish, line 1131), Orbit (btn-orbit, line 1132). Each has click handlers that call showActionResult with the respective action type and saves the action to localStorage.
